title: Potato Pickaxes
description: This Resource Pack Changes Potatoes into Diamond Pickaxe's. It also makes Baked Potatoes into Netherite. This way both are edible and can be stacked working as a prank towards friends
body:
Ever wished your potatoes looked a bit more... useful?
This cursed little resource pack swaps out the textures for potatoes and baked potatoes so they appear as diamond and netherite pickaxes!
It’s perfect for pranking your friends or just giving your Minecraft world a silly twist.
Want to take the joke even further?
Since baked potatoes look like netherite pickaxes, you can “upgrade” your diamond pickaxe potatoes by smelting them.

Smelt your “diamond pickaxe” (raw potatoes) to turn them into “netherite pickaxes” (baked potatoes).

They still act as food, so you can eat your “netherite pickaxe” or stack a whole inventory of them for the ultimate cursed prank.

Hand them to your friends and watch them wonder how you managed to stack “netherite tools.”

It’s harmless fun that plays perfectly into the illusion — edible, stackable “pickaxes” that look like top-tier gear but behave like food.
